economic_notes: First Nation operates Moose Deer Point Marina and holds interest in Mitawbik Ventures Limited Partnership (plastics moulding equipment leasing). COVID-19 pandemic impacted operations. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership reserve fund of $3,801,995.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Mitawbik Ventures Limited Partnership (MVLP) is a GBE accounted for on modified equity basis; it carries $1,000,000 long-term debt at the enterprise level not consolidated on the First Nation balance sheet. Investment in business enterprises carried at $2 due to full impairment provision against partners' deficiency. No schedule of remuneration provided. Child care expenses $500,298 included in expenses_enterprises proxy via Marina segment; child care separately shown as $500,298. COVID-19 pandemic noted as ongoing risk. Ottawa Trust Fund ($156) held in trust by Government of Canada. OSR calculated as total revenue minus provincial transfers ($799,393) and federal transfers ($2,099,715).
